feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Integration Suite
feed.subtitle: SAP Integration Suite Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Oauth authentication integration suite
entry.content:
Hi,

can you help me use Oauth authentication on the integration suite? I created the user on the security material but I get an error.
I read that it is not supported, do you have to use a script to get the token?

 

Thank you

entry.title: Same Counter for two nodes in target structure
entry.content:
Dear integration fellows,

I have duplicated the subtree in the target structure. So I have now on the target structure twice the node called DetaglioLinee. Because we need to map different fields from source to target. We have in the node DetaglioLinee a field called NumeroLinea. For each line item the counter increases by 1.

Now we have two subtrees with different mapping, but I want the counter to be the same. Is this possible? Can we copy maybe the occurence of the source field mapped to first subtree and increment it by then? (e.g E1EDP01 is occuring 2 times, save 2 in variable and increment by 1)

entry.title: SAP CPI OAuth2 Authorization Code (Generic) The Provider 'Generic' did not return a refresh token
entry.content:
hi,

on cpi I configured an OAuth2 Authorization Code (Generic) user in the security material

 

but when I click on the "authorize" button I receive this error The Provider 'Generic' did not return a refresh token for the OAuth2 Authorization Code Credential

can someone help me?

entry.title: CPI URL not returning large payload
entry.content:
Hii,

I have consumed odata url (which have more than 1lakh data for a particular date range) in iflow with http adapter , after successfully generated CPI url then test it via postman with a particular date range(input parameters) and the API return Status Code 200ok but didn't return any data. it is happening when the payload is too large.

entry.title: How to map one particular value in message mapping from multiple values
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing a challenge and need your suggestions for the below scenario.

input side XML: <ROOT>
<item>
<Type>S</Type>
<Message>Success</Message>
</item>
<item>
<Type>S</Type>
<Message>Success</Message>
</item>
<item>
<Type>F</Type>
<Message>Failed</Message>
</item>
</ROOT>

likewise multiple items are coming in the input xml and I want to map only the <Type>F</Type> and <Message>Failed</Message> in the target side. How to achieve this.

Best Regards,

Purusottam Agarwal

entry.title: Remove double from the value of a string in multiple fields
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I have transformed the xml to JSON and got the below output. It is possible to have a single record or multiple records, and the fields are not present in the array.

I will receive three input files. 

1st input file:

 

{
	"timestamp": "2024-03-14T00:00:00.000",
	"productID": "FG_APC_2",
	"unitOfMeasureQuantity": "1",
	"unitOfMeasure": "PC",
	"dimensionUnitOfMeasure": "IN",
	"weightUnitOfMeasure": "KG",
	"description": "Desc_FG_APC_2",
	"length": "100.000",
	"width": "12.000",
	"height": "45.000",
	"weight": "200.000",
	"identifiers": [
		{
			"label": "GTIN",
			"allowedValues": [
				{
					"value": ""
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"alternateUOM": [
		{
			"productID": "FG_APC_2",
			"unitOfMeasureQuantity": "500",
			"unitOfMeasure": "CAR",
			"length": "500.000",
			"width": "60.000",
			"height": "225.000",
			"weight": "1000.000",
			"identifiers": [
				{
					"label": "GTIN",
					"allowedValues": [
						{
							"value": ""
						}
					]
				}
			]
		},
		{
			"productID": "FG_APC_2",
			"unitOfMeasureQuantity": "5000",
			"unitOfMeasure": "PAL",
			"length": "5000.000",
			"width": "600.000",
			"height": "2250.000",
			"weight": "10000.000",
			"identifiers": [
				{
					"label": "GTIN",
					"allowedValues": [
						{
							"value": ""
						}
					]
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"messageType": "product",
	"mode": "MANAGE"
}

 

2nd input file:

 

{
    "timestamp": "2024-03-11T11:07:09-04:00",
    "productID": "LU-T05-SW",
    "unitOfMeasureQuantity": "1",
    "unitOfMeasure": "EA",
    "dimensionUnitOfMeasure": "IN",
    "weightUnitOfMeasure": "LB",
    "description": "LUMARIS TW TAPE 5M SW",
    "length": "9.0",
    "width": "6.5",
    "height": "1.25",
    "weight": "0.2",
    "identifiers": [
        {
            "label": "GTIN",
            "allowedValues": [
                {
                    "value": "0784276311007"
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "messageType": "product",
    "mode": "MANAGE"
}

 

3rd input file:

 

{
	"timestamp": "2024-03-14T00:00:00.000",
	"productID": "FG_APC_2",
	"unitOfMeasureQuantity": "1",
	"unitOfMeasure": "PC",
	"dimensionUnitOfMeasure": "IN",
	"weightUnitOfMeasure": "KG",
	"description": "Desc_FG_APC_2",
	"length": "100.000",
	"width": "12.000",
	"height": "45.000",
	"weight": "200.000",
	"identifiers": [
		{
			"label": "GTIN",
			"allowedValues": [
				{
					"value": ""
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"alternateUOM": [
		{
			"productID": "FG_APC_2",
			"unitOfMeasureQuantity": "500",
			"unitOfMeasure": "CAR",
			"length": "500.000",
			"width": "60.000",
			"height": "225.000",
			"weight": "1000.000",
			"identifiers": [
				{
					"label": "GTIN",
					"allowedValues": [
						{
							"value": ""
						}
					]
				}
			]
		}
	],
	"messageType": "product",
	"mode": "MANAGE"
}

 

As per my requirement, I have to remove the double quotes from the fileds UnitOfMeasureQuantity, length, width, height, and weight, value. 

alternateUOM also same from the fileds UnitOfMeasureQuantity, length, width, height, and weight, value. 

Below are the expected fields values, and the 3 input files mentioned above are also accepted at the same.

 

{
    "timestamp": "2024-03-07T07:04:49-05:00",
    "productID": "DVCL-153PH-WHC",
    "unitOfMeasureQuantity": 1,
    "unitOfMeasure": "EA",
    "dimensionUnitOfMeasure": "IN",
    "weightUnitOfMeasure": "LB",
    "description": "DIVA 150W LED 3WY",
    "length": 2.5,
    "width": 4.0,
    "height": 6.0,
    "weight": 0.27,
    "identifiers": [
        {
            "label": "GTIN",
            "allowedValues": [
                {
                    "value": "0027557003391"
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "alternateUOM": [
        {
            "productID": "DVCL-153PH-WHC",
            "unitOfMeasureQuantity": 3,
            "unitOfMeasure": "IP",
            "length": 4.0,
            "width": 7.5,
            "height": 6.5,
            "weight": 1.0,
            "identifiers": [
                {
                    "label": "GTIN",
                    "allowedValues": [
                        {
                            "value": "30027557003392"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        },
        {
            "productID": "DVCL-153PH-WHC",
            "unitOfMeasureQuantity": 48,
            "unitOfMeasure": "CA",
            "length": 25.5,
            "width": 15.3,
            "height": 8.9,
            "weight": 17.14,
            "identifiers": [
                {
                    "label": "GTIN",
                    "allowedValues": [
                        {
                            "value": "50027557003396"
                        }
                    ]
                }
            ]
        }
    ],
    "messageType": "product",
    "mode": "MANAGE"
}

 

I've taken alook at the blogs, but it doesn't work out for my requirement.

I require your assistance in fixing the issue urgently and archiving the requirement.

Thanks in advance.

Regards,

Thouheed

entry.title: ECC 6.0 trans data to HANA Cloud (if data has Currencies, internal and external codes conversion...)
entry.content:
I would like to inquire about the methods and potential challenges I might encounter when transferring data from an on-premise ERP (ECC 6.0) to SAP HANA Cloud. Here are the approaches I currently know of and the associated issues:

  1. Direct data transfer using SLT, but how would currency or date conversion be handled?
  2. Using Integration Suite, there might be limitations in transferring excessively large datasets.
  3. If migrating from ECC 6.0 to S/4, can existing RFCs or APIs be directly integrated?

I'm unsure if there are solutions to these issues or if there are better methods for integrating ECC with S/4. Your assistance in addressing these queries would be greatly appreciated.

SAP Landscape Transformation SAP HANA Cloud  SAP ERP Central Component

entry.title: Cloud Integration: Switch iflow Type
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

is it possible to switch the iflow type from "REST API" to "Integration Flow" ?

I do not want to build a new one from scratch. 

In my understanding, the only difference is, that REST API necessarily has to have a HTTPS Sender-Adapter.

And my requirements changed to "ProcessDirect".

Thanks in Advance.

Simon

entry.title: 'Non-SAP connectivity' deployment failed.
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using CPI trial account and not able to deploy the created Artifact, any inputs on the below mentioned issue would be helpful. I am doing the below exercise in the URL. Please let me know if I am missing anything.

Design an Integration Flow to Connect with Open Connectors 

 

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: OData call through HTTP Error Handling
entry.content:
Dear All,

We have a scenario as given below. 3rd party is calling an OData service synchronously through CI and Gateway and ERP as per the below flow.

3rd party --> CI --> SAP Gateway --> SAP ERP

We are not using the OData adapter due to some syntax/format issues and HTTP was chosen. Whenever any ABAP dump is thrown in the backend ERP system then the gateway forwards it to CPI but in CPI we get the error like

com.sap.it.rt.adapter.http.api.exception.HttpResponseException: An internal server error occured: HTTP operation failed invoking http://xxxxx/sap/opu/odata/sap/xxxx/xxx with statusCode: 500.
The MPL ID for the failed message is : BGYA-Z0S3gl-6qxBdCngJ8AeHb4c

The detailed error text from ABAP layer is not shown in this message. We have chosen "Return Exception to Sender" in the iFlow settings in order to pass the errors. But how to pass the error dump details from SAP service to the caller?

entry.title: SAP DMC is reaching CPI 3 times per request
entry.content:
Experts,

We've established integration between SAP Cloud Integration (CI) and SAP Digital Manufacturing Cloud (DMC) to transfer specific data from DMC to another system via CI. Within DMC, we've developed a custom process to invoke CI's API. However, we're encountering an issue where CI's API consistently triggers three times: the first two calls are empty, while the third call contains valid input data. Surprisingly, only one log entry appears in DMC's 'Monitor Production Process' section. We've configured CI's details in the destination within the SAP DMC instance and added this destination to DMC's service registry.

Please assist us in resolving this issue.

TIA,

Barath

entry.title: Authentication between SAP API Management and SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello All,

What is the best practice to setup authentication between API Management and Cloud Integration in scenarios where APIM must trigger a CPI iFlow? 

I normally prefer using certificate based authentication by setting up a keystore in APIM and use that in the API provider that is configured for CPI. In CPI, I upload the public certificate of the keystore in the service key. However, we must purchase a certificate keypair signed by a authorised certificate authority or use a S-User generated certificate on SAP Passport. I am not aware if there is any other way to setup a key pair. Interested to know if someone can share their experience here.

I am aware that you can also use OAuth with CPI buy you must create policies inside API proxy to authenticate. Hence, I prefer the certificate based because there is no need to add additional policies in the proxy. I am curious to know how you setup this authentication in your projects?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Webhook for SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello Experts;
I want to use Webhook with SAP integration suite for event driven iflows architecture. I foud this blog but it's not detailed and I'm new to SAP CPI. Any help please 🙂
https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-em-webhook-mechanism-sap-cpi/ba-p/13450415.
I have an SAP BTP Trial account and I want to trigger insertion events in my iflow through webhook.

entry.title: Process Integration test tool SAP PO usages for migration to BTP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

As you know we have a tool called Process Integration test tool in SAP PO.

We are planning to migrate the interfaces from SAP PO to Cloud Integration capability of Integration Suite.

Does that tool can be used while regression testing of migrating interfaces from SAP PO to Cloud Integration?

May I know the replacement of such tool in Cloud Integration capability of Integration Suite?

 

Thanks,

Ramu.

entry.title: How to log a pdf and csv file in CPI which is incoming
entry.content:
I am building a scenario in cpi where csv and pdf files are coming to CPI and being sent to receiver.
before processing the files need to be logged in CPI in original format.
Can someone please help me?

@MortenWittrock can you help please?

entry.title: Event Mesh Webhook to Integration Suite
entry.content:
Hello together,

i have created an event mesh queue, subscription and now a Webhook. I want the message from the event to go directly to an endpoint in the integration suite that i have configured. But every time i get an 401 Error when the message should be send to the Webhook URL. I tried to put in my credentials from the BTP where i have this UserRole, but it´s not working. In the HTTPS configuration in the integration suite you just have the options for UserRole and ClientCertificate (which is not available in the webhook configuration in the event mesh). 

How can i solve this problem?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: How to encrypt when multiple PGP keys are with same userID
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

There is a scenario where 2 PGP public keys are saved in CPI with same userID due to which iflow can't differentiate which PGP key to use.

 

For eg: 

UserID: SFTP Key     KeyId: 123456

UserID: SFTP Key     KeyId: 112233

 

How can we differentiate which PGP key to use, and also can we use KeyID in CPI flow to Encrypt a message?

Best Regards,

Purusottam Agarwal

entry.title: Integration with Adyen from SAP CPI
entry.content:
Hello All,

Can anyone share if there are any blogs that explains about the integration between Adyen and SAP CPI?

Thanks and Regards,

Naresh Dasika

entry.title: Unable to consume messages in S/4 Hana system that are published in Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hi there,

we have created a event consumption Model as suggested in below blog till step 8.

Event Processing in an SAP S/4HANA on-premise system | SAP Tutorials

We want consume the message that is published  in Event mesh queue. Kindly help.

entry.title: Connect SAP Master Data TO CPI
entry.content:
Good Day Everyone,

I need advice on how to connect SAP to a CPI IFlow. 

The end objective of the iflow is to gather information from an SFTP (a PDF), look up the vendor ID in SAP, and from that vendor ID, grab its email from the master data in SAP, and then send the PDF through email adapter.

We got everything figured out except on how to connect SAP ---> CPI.

Thanks for the help.
